case_title: REINA AGUILERA VS. WILLIAM H. TSE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF REINA AGUILERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM H. TSE IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED ON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TSE, WILLIAM H. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT WILLIAM H. TSE. EACH PART TO BEAR HIS OR HER OWN COSTS. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED LOSS OF APPLIANCES OR THAT ANY APPLIANCES WERE DAMAGED NOR DID PLAINTIFF ESTABLISH THE VALUE OF THE DAMAGED APPLIANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,951.20 FILED BY AGUILERA, REINA AS TO DEFENDANT TSE, WILLIAM H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY AGUILERA, REINA TSE, WILLIAM H.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 00.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, REINA AS TO DEFENDANT TSE, WILLIAM H.
